title: TODO: short title
description: Nginx is returning 502 Bad Gateway for all PHP requests. The root cause is a user mismatch between Nginx and PHP-FPM: the socket at /run/php-fpm.sock is owned by www-data (Nginx's user) but PHP-FPM is running as apache. Nginx cannot write to a socket it does not own. Both user and group in the PHP-FPM config must be changed to www-data, and the service state set to healthy.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/advanced-scenarios/php-fpm.conf to find the user mismatch
hint_2: the socket is inaccessible to Nginx
hint_3: Change user and group to www-data so Nginx can connect to the PHP-FPM socket
